hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Docs check: did any changes this session affect architecture, API endpoints, data models, auth, storage, deployment, the analysis pipeline, environment variables, or frontend components? If yes, update README.md and/or docs/walkthrough.md per the table in CLAUDE.md §7 before finishing. Skip if changes were purely internal (refactor, test, bug fix with no visible behaviour change)."}'
